criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app analytics, download statistics.

criteria.name: Innovative Features
criteria.description: The presence of unique and novel functionalities that set the app apart.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, official announcements, tech reviews.

criteria.name: Market Presence
criteria.description: The app's popularity and reach in the market.
criteria.sources: Download numbers, active user counts, market reports.

criteria.name: User Satisfaction
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction and positive feedback.
